summary: Iteration 23 — Centralized Pricing Engine (backend) + /pricing page (frontend). ALL 11 backend pytest cases pass. Frontend /pricing renders 3 cards, region toggle switches IN(₹499)/INTL($9), Most Popular badge on Annual, feature comparison table renders. Monetization endpoints read dynamically from the engine (mutation of monthly.IN → 599 propagated to /api/payments/pricing) and were reset back to defaults after test.

verified_scenarios.evidence: region=IN, symbol=₹, currency=inr, plans=[download,monthly,annual], settings{freeFirstDownload=true, mostPopular=annual, emailCaptureBeforePaywall=true}, features[6], annualSavingsPct int, gateway=stripe
PUT 200 → GET /config?region=IN shows 599 → GET /payments/pricing?region=IN monthly.amount=599 (confirms engine is source of truth)
IN: download 25 inr / monthly 499 / annual 3999; INTL: 1 usd / 9 / 79; gateway=stripe
pricing-page + 3 pricing-card-* + pricing-popular-badge inside annual card + pricing-comparison table

critical_code_review_comments: pricing.py.resolve() return type annotation uses `(float, str)` which Python treats as a tuple expression, not a Tuple type hint. Cosmetic — use Tuple[float,str] for correctness/lint.

pricing.py._validate_plans: only validates fields matching REGIONS keys. If admin PUT includes a typo like {'IN ':100}, it silently persists garbage. Consider strict-schema validation on plans mutation.
pricing.py PUT /admin: `patch['updatedBy']` reads admin.get('sub') which for legacy X-Admin-Token is the literal string 'legacy'. Fine, but consider storing 'legacy-admin-token' for audit clarity.

monetize.py still exposes RAZORPAY_ENABLED derived from env at import time; combined with pricing.gateway_for() the two truths could disagree. Prefer a single source (engine gateways) even for the /payments/pricing response flag.
Pricing.jsx effect: `setBusy` is never cleared on redirect. If Stripe checkout URL fails to navigate for any reason, button stays disabled. Add a safety timer or finally block.
test_credentials: Admin: header X-Admin-Token: leadnation-admin-2026. Guest: X-Trade-Session: <uuid>. No user login exercised (Firebase CORS-blocked in preview per problem statement).
seed_data_creation: Pricing config auto-seeded on first /config call (server startup already seeds it). Test writes ephemeral events + one email capture (test_<hex>@example.com) into paywall_events/email_captures. No production data mutated; monthly.IN mutation was reset to 499.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression file /app/backend/tests/test_pricing_engine.py covers the full pricing engine + monetization integration contract (11 tests, ~15s). Load /app/frontend/.env for REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Defaults: download IN=25 INTL=1, monthly IN=499 INTL=9, annual IN=3999 INTL=79. Admin header only (legacy) works in preview — Firebase login is CORS-blocked.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA; centralized pricing engine + admin CMS control + monetization dynamic reads verified end-to-end.
